description: Sector-tuned incident investigation for a mining event (a DGMS-reportable accident or dangerous occurrence) — de-id-first 4-fan-out, ICAM-led root-cause analysis reaching organisational factors, a DGMS reportability verdict (24-hour notice + Form J entry), and a hierarchy-of-controls CAPA plan with named owners and due dates. Use it to investigate a mine accident, run an RCA on a mining incident, or determine DGMS reportability. Decision-support only; a competent (DGMS-qualified) person must review the output. Statutory form ids beyond the verified DGMS anchors are recorded as [GAP], never invented.
name: mine-incident-investigation
notes: Markdown-report degradation; run the intake conversationally.
